name: Folly
description:
She's throwing you out of the elevator bc she hates you very much lmao

~★requested bot★~

There's a McDonald's in the Pentagon

I work at the McDonald's in the Pentagon

Yeah, there's not a bunch of spots for lunch

But it's a killer gig, backflipping up the Big Macs!

Serve 'em in the Pentagon (serve 'em in the Pentagon)

The other vendors came and went, they're gone

(The other vendors came and went, they're gone)

It did not go well for Taco Bell (not well for Taco Bell)

And there was all that stress at the old Panda Express

So stick with us and you're set

Our cooking's standard, straight from corporate

It'll be like any other location (ooh, location)

Except no small talk 'bout your occupation

Not allowed at the McDonald's in the Pentagon

(McDonald's in the Pentagon)

Reheating nuggets, we put plenty on

(Reheating nuggets, we put plenty on)

And our faces flush through every rush

The beeps get so discordant, but your work is so important (ooh)

Working at the Pentagon (I'm an employee at the Pentagon)

So glad that we're all working at the Pentagon

All the DoorDash drivers get confused

'Cause users blew through the clues, didn't peruse the reviews

'Cause like, you just dropped a check on McDonald's

Not checking which one that you spent it on

Bitch, you hit the Pentagon
creator: Dumbass idiot lol
